---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Bharat Inventory
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of what the problem is. e.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or features you've thought about.

**Which part of the app does this affect?**
- [ ] Dashboard / Hub
- [ ] Inventory list
- [ ] Product detail / Add / Edit
- [ ] Barcode / AI Scanner
- [ ] Bulk Import
- [ ] Deep Intel / Analytics
- [ ] AI Chat
- [ ] Settings
- [ ] Database schema
- [ ] Other (describe below)

**Additional context**
Mockups, links, or other context about the feature request.
